Name: departments
SQL: SELECT coalesce(json_group_array(json("_root")), '[]') AS "_root" FROM (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "departments" LIMIT 3) SELECT json_object('id', "_root.base"."id", 'name', "_root.base"."name", 'activeEmployees', (SELECT coalesce(json_group_array(json("_root.r.activeEmployees")), '[]') AS "activeEmployees" FROM (WITH "_root.r.activeEmployees.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "user_departments" WHERE "user_departments"."is_active" = ? AND "department_id" = "_root.base"."id" LIMIT 10) SELECT json_object('role', "_root.r.activeEmployees.base"."role", 'user', (WITH "_root.r.activeEmployees.r.user.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "users" WHERE "_root.r.activeEmployees.base"."user_id" = "id" LIMIT 1) SELECT json_object('id', "_root.r.activeEmployees.r.user.base"."id", 'displayName', "_root.r.activeEmployees.r.user.base"."display_name") AS "user" FROM "_root.r.activeEmployees.r.user.base")) AS "_root.r.activeEmployees" FROM "_root.r.activeEmployees.base") AS "_root.r.activeEmployees"), 'inactiveEmployees', (SELECT coalesce(json_group_array(json("_root.r.inactiveEmployees")), '[]') AS "inactiveEmployees" FROM (WITH "_root.r.inactiveEmployees.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "user_departments" WHERE "user_departments"."is_active" = ? AND "department_id" = "_root.base"."id" LIMIT 10) SELECT json_object('role', "_root.r.inactiveEmployees.base"."role", 'user', (WITH "_root.r.inactiveEmployees.r.user.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "users" WHERE "_root.r.inactiveEmployees.base"."user_id" = "id" LIMIT 1) SELECT json_object('id', "_root.r.inactiveEmployees.r.user.base"."id", 'displayName', "_root.r.inactiveEmployees.r.user.base"."display_name") AS "user" FROM "_root.r.inactiveEmployees.r.user.base")) AS "_root.r.inactiveEmployees" FROM "_root.r.inactiveEmployees.base") AS "_root.r.inactiveEmployees")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base") AS "_root"
